bits.premise: A short microphone can feel like rare height accommodation.
Backhanded celebrity comparisons can feel flattering when the baseline is worse.
An anti-autism celebrity crush makes sex self-defeating.

lines.text: Oh, my size microphone.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Ah, it's a big deal for me.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I get haircuts for this.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Got a lot of different reactions on the haircut, though.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Younger comic told me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Melee, you look like you're in your 20s
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and 40s at the same time."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Had a little girl run up to me, said,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "You look like Jason Momoa, the Wish.com version."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Heckler told me, "I look like Jason Momoa
lines.label: setup

lines.text: if he was Aquaman who only lived in a puddle.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Your laughter indicates you think these are insults,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I took him as a compliment.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause prior to the Momoa,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was getting Walmart Mark Wahlberg.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Which I'm fairly certain is just Donnie Wahlberg.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But I can never beat Donnie.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Not 'cause of the singing, dancing, acting.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He can barely do that.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It's 'cause he married Jenny McCarthy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: McCarthy. And yes, Jenny was a masturbatory fantasy in my teens and
lines.label: setup

lines.text: twenties. But 40-year-old me knows that would be a sexless marriage because
lines.label: setup

lines.text: she's trying to end autism and you can't do that by fucking a retard. Thank you
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: folks. Hey we got there in the end.
lines.label: fluff
